chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-179 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 15.10.2024 Mr. Yasir Ismail Khoso Advocate for Petitioner. Syed Shahzad Ali Shah Advocate for Respondents-HMC along with Sajid Iqbal, Accounts Officer HMC. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh. Learned Counsel for Respondents-HMC states that arrears will be cleared in four installments and monthly pension is paid regularly. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner does not dispute that payment of monthly pension is being received but submits that the payment of arrears is being delayed without justification. Under the circumstances, this Petition is disposed of by directing Respondents-HMC to clear the arrears within three installments and in six weeks, failing which the Director Finance will be exposed to contempt proceedings. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
